title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Wadhwa Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Wadhwa Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
